[9/23/25, 14:25:40] ~ Pavan Pamidimarri: Inaugural question: The repeal of the English Corn Laws in 1846 was the first major victory. Name this economic principle?
[9/23/25, 14:26:01] Akshay: Tariffs?
[9/23/25, 14:26:15] ~ Pavan Pamidimarri: Nope, think broader
[9/23/25, 14:27:10] Aditi Bapat: Free trade!
[9/23/25, 14:27:20] ~ Pavan Pamidimarri: Bingo! Free trade it is 🎉
